title: Shakespeare's Globe Theatre: The Comedy of Errors
original_title: The Comedy of Errors - Live at Shakespeare's Globe
overview: Basing his plot on a farce by Plautus, Shakespeare caps the mayhem of his Roman original to build up a hectic tale of violent cross-purposes, furious slapstick and social nightmare.
